use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OR PROPHYLAXIS OF ANGINA PECTORIS AND ARRHYTHMIA

indications.text:
LO/OVRAL-28 is indicated for use by females of reproductive potential to prevent pregnancy.
The efficacy of LO/OVRAL-28 in women with a body mass index (BMI) of > 35 kg/m2 has not been evaluated.

LO/OVRAL is indicated for use by females of reproductive potential to prevent pregnancy.
The efficacy of LO/OVRAL in women with a body mass index (BMI) of > 35 kg/m2 has not been evaluated.

Oral contraceptives are indicated for the prevention of pregnancy in women who elect to use this
product as a method of contraception.
